languages.text: "Проверить меня вздумали? Не, спасибо, в политику я не играю".

traits.locale_text: "Проверить меня вздумали? Не, спасибо, в политику я не играю".

languages.text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."
languages.original_text: "Проверить меня вздумали? Не, спасибо, в политику я не играю".

traits.locale_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."
"Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."
"Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

languages.text: “这是在考验我吗？免了，我不玩政治那一套。”
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: “这是在考验我吗？免了，我不玩政治那一套。”

languages.text: « Vous cherchez à me tester ? Non merci, je ne me mêle pas de la politique. »
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: « Vous cherchez à me tester ? Non merci, je ne me mêle pas de la politique. »

languages.text: "Bu bir tür sınav mı? Beni bulaştırmayın, siyasetle işim olmaz."
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: "Bu bir tür sınav mı? Beni bulaştırmayın, siyasetle işim olmaz."

languages.text: «¿Es esto una prueba? No, gracias, no me meto en política».
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: «¿Es esto una prueba? No, gracias, no me meto en política».

languages.text: "Soll das ein Test sein? Nein, danke, Politik ist nicht mein Ding."
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: "Soll das ein Test sein? Nein, danke, Politik ist nicht mein Ding."

languages.text: 「これは何かの試験ですか？いいえ、政治には関わりません。」
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."

traits.locale_text: 「これは何かの試験ですか？いいえ、政治には関わりません。」
